title: BetterFoods
description: This mod adds more in-depth baking mechanics and coffee!
body:
This mod adds more in-depth baking

Everything is covered in the Cookbook (which is crafted by cooking a book)
Wiki: (coming soon)

This is still a very early project, expect some bugs/unfinished content

Server functionality tested, it should work fine.

We are fine with using this mod in your modpack, just link back to this page for credit.

With love - CrazyFox

Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crazyfoxs-betterfoods
